caption: A woman with her hair styled in a high blonde bun wears a black t-shirt and over-ear headphones while sitting in a studio. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind her is a yellow wall and a black backdrop. A screen to her left displays the word "Johnson" in red text, and a small sign above it reads "Employee Only". To her right, the text "BOSS TALK 101" appears in red and white, accompanied by a small logo and the words "By 11 Logo Studio". A small logo for "STUDIO PODCAST" is also visible. As the scene progresses, the woman slightly tilts her head and begins to speak, her facial expressions shifting as she talks into the microphone. The background and equipment remain stationary throughout the sequence.
